title: Nimbus
description: An Optimization Modpack by 105hua, bringing you the best no-compromises performance for your game.
body:
# Nimbus - An Optimization Pack

**!!! NOTICE !!!**

As of 30th July 2024, I have made the decision to discontinue the Nimbus project indefinitely. Reasoning will be provided in due course.

---

Welcome to the official Modrinth page for Nimbus, my new Optimization Pack, now on 1.20.4!

Based on Fabric (Formerly Quilt), Nimbus is an Optimization Pack which aims to provide you with a significantly faster and better Minecraft experience, compared to that of Vanilla Minecraft. This is done through the inclusion of a number of mods which improve a great variety of aspects about the game, the most significant of which include:

- **Sodium**, which provides a modern rendering engine for Minecraft, greatly improving performance while fixing graphical issues.
- **Entity Culling**, which takes advantage of async path-tracing to hide Blocks and/or Entities that are not visible to the player.
- **StutterFix**, which modifies the way threads work with the aim of reducing stuttering when generating chunks.


Nimbus also doubles as a base modpack, meaning that you can also use it as a base modpack for your projects! All I ask is that you credit me and let me know that you are doing so.
